title: bitwise comparison fails after a cast
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_bitwise (id UInt32, value Int32, small_value Int16, nullable_value Nullable(Int32));
INSERT INTO test_bitwise (value, small_value) VALUES (16, toInt16(16));
SELECT value & small_value FROM test_bitwise WHERE small_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT 16 & nullable_value FROM test_bitwise WHERE nullable_value IS NULL;
key_bug_features: bitwise comparison fails after casting to smallint
